title: CNN: What to watch in the US-Iran memo to end the war — key factors in Trump deliberation
snippet: CNN analysis of key factors in Trump's MoU deliberation: (1) Iran-US escalating military clashes may undermine deal, (2) Lebanon conflict — Iran insisting on inclusion, (3) Khamenei's approval uncertainty, (4) Trump's domestic political calculus, (5) oil price movements as barometer. Notes that Trump and Khamenei are in mirrored positions — both have negotiating teams who agreed, both leaders haven't signed off.
tag_reason: 신규 — CNN 분석의 '거울상(mirrored positions)' 프레이밍과 5가지 변수 분석은 새로운 관점
